# boxMin

**Instance Property**

The corner of the box with the lowest coordinate values (in most coordinate systems, the far-lower-left corner).

## Declaration

```swift
var boxMin: vector_float3
```

## Instance Properties

- **boxMax**: The corner of the box with the highest coordinate values (in most coordinate systems, the near-upper-right corner).
